accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: You don't have sufficient permissions to manage commands. Required access level: commands.

botDisabledWarning.title: ⚠️ Bot Disabled
botDisabledWarning.message: The bot is currently disabled. Enable it from settings for commands to work.

permissionInfo.title: ℹ️ Read-Only Mode
permissionInfo.message: You can view commands but cannot modify their state. Contact the channel owner for changes.

title.name: !title
title.description: Change or check the stream title

t.name: !t
t.description: Alias for !title - Change or check the stream title

game.name: !game
game.description: Change or check the stream category/game

dstart.name: !dstart
dstart.description: Start the timer with a specific duration

dplay.name: !dplay
dplay.description: Resume or start the paused timer

dreset.name: !dreset
dreset.description: Reset the timer to the configured total time

dstop.name: !dstop
dstop.description: Stop the timer completely and hide it from overlay

dtimer.name: !dtimer
dtimer.description: Manage timer: start, add or remove time

so.name: !so
so.description: Shoutout a user showing their latest clip and profile

ia.name: !ia
usage: !ia What is the meaning of life?

join.name: !join
join.description: Join the active giveaway in the channel

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: You don't have sufficient permissions to access microcommands. Required access level: "Commands" or higher.

header.title: Micro Commands
header.subtitle: Manage custom shortcuts for game categories - Channel: {{channel}}

permissionInfo.message: Limited mode - "Moderation" level or higher required to delete micro commands

empty.title: No micro commands
empty.message: Create your first micro command to get started

createModal.title: Create Micro Command
createModal.commandHelper: The "!" prefix will be added automatically
createModal.gamePlaceholder: Search game... e.g.: lol, valorant, minecraft

editModal.title: Edit Micro Command
editModal.gamePlaceholder: Search new game... e.g.: lol, valorant, minecraft

messages.deleteNoPermission: You don't have permission to delete micro commands
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the micro command {{command}}?

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: You don't have sufficient permissions to access custom commands. Required access level: "Commands" or higher.

header.title: Custom Commands
header.subtitle: Manage custom text commands for your channel

permissionInfo.message: Limited mode - "Moderation" level or higher required to delete commands

empty.title: No custom commands
empty.message: Create your first custom command to get started

createModal.title: Create Custom Command
createModal.commandHelper: The "!" prefix will be added automatically
createModal.responsePlaceholder: The response the bot will send...

editModal.title: Edit Custom Command
editModal.commandHelper: The command name cannot be modified

exportModal.title: Export Commands
exportModal.message: Select the commands you want to export

importModal.title: Import Commands
importModal.dropzoneText: Drag a JSON file here or click to select

messages.deleteNoPermission: You don't have permission to delete commands
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the command {{command}}?
messages.fieldsRequired: Command name and response are required
messages.exportError: Select at least one command to export
messages.importInvalidFile: Invalid file. Must be a JSON with correct format.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: You don't have sufficient permissions to access scripts. Required access level: "Commands" or higher.

header.title: Scripting Commands
header.subtitle: Create custom commands with advanced logic using scripting

permissionInfo.message: Limited mode - "Moderation" level or higher required to delete scripts

empty.title: No scripts
empty.message: Create your first script for advanced commands
